_comment: Code-hosting platform profiles. A profile is pure wire data describing how to talk to a platform — API base url, webhook route + signature scheme, event header, and which platform concepts it supports. Behaviour lives in the BaseProvider subclass (mira.providers) and the PlatformAuth/RepoFetcher implementations; this file just removes the per-platform branching. Adding an OpenAI-style git platform is a one-line entry. Resolved by name (e.g. 'github', 'gitlab').

_fields.api_url: REST API base. For GitHub Enterprise / self-managed GitLab, override via MIRA_GITHUB_API_URL / MIRA_GITLAB_API_URL.
_fields.webhook_route: FastAPI path this platform's webhooks POST to.
_fields.signature: Webhook auth: scheme ('hmac-sha256' | 'shared-token'), header name, and optional prefix.
_fields.event_header: Request header carrying the event type.
_fields.supports: Capability flags gating platform-specific machinery (e.g. GitHub installations).
